pi_items.source: Web search (e.g. n2yo.com, satellitemap.space) verifying real NORAD catalog numbers for AQUA, AURA, OCO-2, and GCOM-W1
Web search confirms NASA Goddard Space Flight Center is located at approximately 38.99 N
Web search confirms NASA Goddard Space Flight Center is located at approximately 76.85 W
Web search confirms NASA Goddard Space Flight Center elevation is approximately 49-50 meters (160 feet) above sea level
Web search confirming the satellite common names corresponding to the NORAD IDs

privileged_info_summary: Verified via web search that AQUA (27424), AURA (28376), OCO-2 (40059), and GCOM-W1 (38337) are real satellites with the correct NORAD catalog IDs. Verified that the coordinates provided for NASA Goddard Space Flight Center (38.9951 N, -76.8505 W, 50m altitude) are accurate for its real-world location in Greenbelt, MD. Data is not synthetic, as GPredict will fetch real TLE data from the network.
